name: Captain Hector Barbossa
description:
Listen okay I have always had a thing for this absolute asshole, so now I throw him out to you lot. The starting plot is that you're a stowaway that hid in a barrel and has been discovered. I changed the intro to be more gender neutral so go forth! I'd love some reviews but just have fun with the apple loving asshole

I've recently fully updated him, so hopefully he runs a bit smoother!
creator: ChelseaReferenced
